text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Thank you very much for<n>taking time
to come see my race the<n>other day!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes, and what an excellent race it was.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I know you changed your running style<n>shortly
before the race, but you<n>managed to pull it off
splendidly.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Naturally! I would never dare to ignore<n>advice
from you of all people!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Frankly, I was... worried that my words<n>may have
placed a heavy burden on you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But I see now that there was no cause for<n>concern.
Your diligence is not something<n>to be trifled with.
